title: Replace the Old Teacher
wikitext:
[]: Replace the Old Teacher             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Dec 08, 2009 3:53 pm Let's say that senile old teacher gets fired and there is a job opening. Who would you replace him with? Can be anybody Eva or Non-Eva. I would either replace him with Gendo if he could find time in his busy schedule, or Gunnery Sergeant Hartman. Either way those kids would stay focused and pay attention. Hartman would scare the piss out of them though.

[]:             Quote Post by Omegagouki » Tue Dec 08, 2009 4:11 pm Kamina from Gurren Lagann . Then everyone will be awesome and motivated!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Dec 08, 2009 4:19 pm Keichi Onizuka (Great Teacher Onizuka). The result maybe pretty amusing.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue Dec 08, 2009 4:29 pm Ms. Bitters from Invader Zim. So much doom and implosions. Misato. The alternate reality in episode 26 comes to mind. A zombie. The zombie tries to eat Hikari! Hilarity ensues!!

[]:             Quote Post by knightrous » Tue Dec 08, 2009 5:11 pm Kaji The teacher who rocks up, unshaven, tie not done up properly and spends most of his lessons talking about the woman in the bar from last night.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Tue Dec 08, 2009 5:19 pm Char Aznable. He would paint the students red so they are three times as efficient. But, he would also try to "get with" the Asuka, Rei, and all of the other little girls in the class. With this in mind, my vote would go to Mr. (Ms.) Herbert Garrison.

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Tue Dec 08, 2009 5:22 pm Kimura from Azumanga Daioh... ... ...

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Dec 08, 2009 5:39 pm Youuu, You knowwwww who needs to be The teacher. Walkin, C.Walkin He He would beeee the best Teacccchher for them.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Dec 08, 2009 6:52 pm Either Onizuka or Washu. No, wait! Yukari-sensei!!

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Tue Dec 08, 2009 6:53 pm Lil' Slugger

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Dec 08, 2009 7:09 pm while Gunny is a good choice, I would have to go with Misato, she would be fantastic as "the hot teacher" with everyone wanting to get under her skirt

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Tue Dec 08, 2009 7:37 pm Samuel L. Jackson.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Tue Dec 08, 2009 7:48 pm I say Washu, or Miss Yukari. Actually change it Washu, Lets see SEELE and Gendo try pull their Instrumentality crap on an all knowing all powerful goddess!

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Dec 08, 2009 8:48 pm just for laughs, i'll just say Seymour Skinners

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Dec 08, 2009 8:52 pm Zetsubou Sensei.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Dec 08, 2009 9:14 pm Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue Dec 08, 2009 11:09 pm Merridian wrote: Samuel L. Jackson.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Tue Dec 08, 2009 11:29 pm Excel

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Wed Dec 09, 2009 12:52 am And when you have angels running freely in our cities and cabals overseeing our future, of course you'd be bloody mad! It pisses me off! They take childrens' mothers and compact their souls and then put them in fucking god damn awesome humanoid giant contraptions! They drive these children insane! Our survival is dependent on children ! You're fucking nuts! All of you! I can't take this! I cannot take this! So, today, class, I will kill myself in front of your knowledge-hungry eyes!

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Wed Dec 09, 2009 8:38 am Sachi wrote: Zetsubou Sensei.
